name: Goa
tagline: Golden sands, colonial charm & vibrant nightlife
description: India's favourite beach destination blends Portuguese heritage, laid-back beach shacks, water sports, and a pulsating nightlife. Perfect for friends looking to unwind or couples seeking a romantic coastal escape.

name: Kashmir Valley
tagline: Paradise on earth — houseboats, Himalayan vistas & meadows
description: Dal Lake houseboats, shikara rides at dawn, the emerald meadows of Gulmarg and Pahalgam — Kashmir is a dream destination that rewards every kind of traveller.

name: Rajasthan — Jaipur, Jodhpur & Jaisalmer
tagline: The Land of Kings — forts, palaces & the golden desert
description: A royal circuit through India's most photogenic state — the pink city of Jaipur, the blue city of Jodhpur, and the golden sands of Jaisalmer with desert camps under the stars.

name: Varanasi
tagline: The eternal city — spirituality, ghats & ancient rituals
description: One of the world's oldest living cities, Varanasi is a profound spiritual experience. Morning boat rides on the Ganges, the mesmerising Ganga Aarti, silk weaving lanes, and the timeless energy of the ghats.

name: Andaman & Nicobar Islands
tagline: Pristine islands, turquoise waters & world-class coral reefs
description: Untouched beaches, crystal-clear lagoons, scuba diving among vibrant coral reefs, and the haunting Cellular Jail — the Andamans offer a rare blend of adventure and serenity far from the mainland crowds.

name: Kerala Backwaters & Munnar
tagline: God's own country — backwaters, tea estates & Ayurveda
description: Float through the serene backwaters on a houseboat, wake up to misty tea gardens in Munnar, and rejuvenate with authentic Ayurvedic treatments. Kerala is India's most complete wellness and nature destination.

name: Coorg (Kodagu)
tagline: Scotland of India — coffee estates, mist & waterfalls
description: India's coffee capital nestled in the Western Ghats. Lush coffee and spice plantations, trekking trails, elephant camps, and cool misty weather make Coorg an ideal short escape from South Indian cities.

name: Rishikesh & Haridwar
tagline: Yoga capital of the world — adventure, spirituality & the Ganges
description: White-water rafting in the Ganges, bungee jumping, yoga retreats, and the divine Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri — Rishikesh seamlessly blends adrenaline with spirituality. A must-visit for every kind of traveller.

name: Tirupati & Tirumala
tagline: Abode of Lord Venkateswara — the world's most visited pilgrimage
description: Tirupati is the holiest Hindu pilgrimage in India, drawing millions to the hilltop Tirumala temple. A deeply spiritual experience complemented by Andhra's cultural richness and the scenic Eastern Ghats.

name: Spiti Valley
tagline: The middle land — monasteries, moonscapes & extreme adventure
description: A cold desert mountain valley in the Himalayas unlike anything else in India. Ancient monasteries perched on cliffs, fossil-rich terrain, sparse villages and the kind of silence that resets your soul. For the adventurous traveller.

name: Hampi
tagline: The ruined empire — a UNESCO World Heritage boulder-scape
description: Once the world's second-largest medieval city, Hampi is a dreamlike landscape of ancient temples, giant boulders, banana plantations, and the ruins of the mighty Vijayanagara Empire. A paradise for history lovers and photographers.

name: Darjeeling & Sikkim
tagline: Queen of the Hills — tea gardens, Kanchenjunga views & monasteries
description: Toy train rides through misty tea gardens, sunrise at Tiger Hill with Kanchenjunga glowing pink, Buddhist monasteries, and the warmth of Sikkim's local culture. A perfect Himalayan escape.

name: Char Dham Yatra — Uttarakhand
tagline: The sacred circuit — Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath & Badrinath
description: India's most revered pilgrimage circuit in the high Himalayas. Visiting Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath (via helicopter or trek), and Badrinath is considered a lifetime spiritual achievement by millions of Hindus.

name: Ladakh
tagline: Land of high passes — magnetic hills, monasteries & starry nights
description: One of the most dramatic landscapes on earth. Pangong Lake, the moonscapes of Nubra Valley, ancient Tibetan monasteries, and roads that test both your bike and your soul. Ladakh is every adventurer's dream.

name: Pondicherry
tagline: The French Riviera of India — boulevards, cafés & tranquil beaches
description: Charming French Quarter boulevards, colonial architecture painted in white and yellow, Sri Aurobindo Ashram, pristine beaches, and some of South India's best cafés and restaurants. A serene short getaway.

name: Agra & Taj Mahal
tagline: The monument to eternal love — a UNESCO wonder in marble
description: The Taj Mahal at sunrise, the imposing Agra Fort, the deserted Fatehpur Sikri, and the best Mughlai cuisine you'll ever taste. Agra is short in duration but infinite in experience.

name: Ooty & Nilgiris
tagline: Queen of hill stations — toy trains, eucalyptus & blue mountains
description: Ooty's rolling Nilgiri hills, the famous toy train through verdant forests, Botanical Gardens, Emerald Lake, and the aroma of fresh eucalyptus and tea. A classic family hill-station escape from South India's heat.

name: Puri & Bhubaneswar
tagline: Temple city & beach — the divine circuit of Odisha
description: Puri's Jagannath Temple (one of the Char Dhams), Konark's magnificent Sun Temple, and Bhubaneswar's ancient Lingaraja Temple combine with pristine Puri beach to create one of India's richest cultural-pilgrimage circuits.

name: Lonavala & Mahabaleshwar
tagline: Weekend escape from Mumbai — misty ghats, forts & strawberry farms
description: The Western Ghats' most beloved weekend destinations. Lonavala's dramatic valleys and ancient forts, Mahabaleshwar's strawberry farms, Mapro Garden, and panoramic viewpoints make this a perfect short Mumbai/Pune escape.

name: Ranthambore
tagline: Wild encounters — Bengal tigers, ancient ruins & wildlife
description: India's most famous tiger reserve, where Bengal tigers roam among the ruins of a 10th-century fort. Ranthambore offers some of India's best big-cat sightings, with jungle safaris that are thrilling for the whole family.

name: Vrindavan & Mathura
tagline: The land of Lord Krishna — divine ghats, temples & Holi festival
description: Mathura, the birthplace of Lord Krishna, and Vrindavan, the town of his childhood, together form India's most important Vaishnava pilgrimage. The Holi festival here is the most spectacular in the world.

name: Meghalaya — Shillong & Cherrapunji
tagline: Abode of clouds — living root bridges, waterfalls & caves
description: The wettest place on earth is also one of its most beautiful. Living root bridges woven over centuries, thundering waterfalls, emerald valleys, Dawki's crystal-clear river, and Shillong's laid-back café culture.

name: Amritsar
tagline: Golden Temple, resilient history & the world's most dramatic border ceremony
description: The Golden Temple is India's most visited site — a place of breathtaking beauty and profound peace. Combine this with the moving Wagah Border ceremony, Jallianwala Bagh, and the legendary kulcha-lassi food trail.
cuisine: Sarson Da Saag Makki Di Roti

name: Lakshadweep — Bangaram & Agatti
tagline: India's hidden coral paradise — lagoons bluer than the Maldives
description: India's best-kept secret — a remote coral archipelago in the Arabian Sea with lagoons so blue they rival the Maldives. Pristine beaches, world-class snorkelling, and near-zero crowds. Reached by ship or small aircraft.

name: Uttarakhand — Valley of Flowers & Auli
tagline: Himalayan trekking paradise — blooming valleys & ski slopes
description: The Valley of Flowers National Park (UNESCO) transforms into a sea of alpine blooms in monsoon. Auli's snow-capped slopes offer India's best skiing. Together they form an epic Himalayan adventure circuit.

name: Barcelona & Costa Brava
tagline: Gaudí's masterpieces, Mediterranean beaches & Catalan charm
description: Barcelona's architectural wonders by Gaudí, vibrant La Boqueria market, Gothic Quarter lanes, and the rugged Costa Brava coastline with crystal coves. One of Europe's most complete travel destinations.

name: Paris & French Riviera
tagline: City of Light meets Côte d'Azur — romance, fashion & azure sea
description: The Eiffel Tower at night, world-class museums, haute couture shopping, then down to the French Riviera for glamorous Nice, Monaco's grandeur, and Cannes' gilded beaches. The ultimate luxury European experience.

name: Thailand — Bangkok, Chiang Mai & Islands
tagline: The land of smiles — temples, street food & island paradise
description: Bangkok's electrifying street energy and golden temples, Chiang Mai's ancient Lanna culture and elephant sanctuaries, and the stunning islands of Koh Samui and Koh Phi Phi. Thailand delivers infinite variety.

name: Maldives
tagline: Overwater bungalows, turquoise infinity & the ultimate luxury escape
description: The world's most iconic honeymoon destination. Private overwater villas, bioluminescent beaches, whale shark swimming, and underwater restaurants. Pure luxury in the most pristine marine environment on earth.

name: Japan — Tokyo, Kyoto & Osaka
tagline: The perfect paradox — ancient temples & neon-lit modernity
description: Tokyo's futuristic energy and kawaii culture, Kyoto's thousand-year-old temples and geisha districts, Osaka's legendary food scene. Japan is one of the most rewarding travel experiences in the world.

name: Bali, Indonesia
tagline: Island of the Gods — rice terraces, temples & spiritual retreat
description: Bali's perfect blend of spiritual culture, lush rice terraces, surf-worthy beaches, vibrant arts scene, and world-class spa retreats. Ubud for the soul, Seminyak for the scene, Uluwatu for the views.

name: Dubai & Abu Dhabi
tagline: Desert dreams — sky-high luxury, golden deserts & mega malls
description: The world's most ambitious city. Burj Khalifa, Palm Jumeirah, desert safaris with dune bashing, world's largest malls, and Abu Dhabi's magnificent Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque. A showcase of human ambition.

name: Switzerland — Interlaken & Zermatt
tagline: The roof of Europe — the Matterhorn, glaciers & chocolate box villages
description: Interlaken flanked by two jewel lakes with the Jungfrau towering above, and Zermatt under the iconic Matterhorn. Skiing, paragliding, cogwheel trains and the cleanest air you'll ever breathe. Peak luxury meets Alpine adventure.

name: New Zealand — North & South Island
tagline: Middle Earth & beyond — fjords, geothermal wonders & bungee jumping
description: Milford Sound's otherworldly fjords, Rotorua's geothermal geysers, Hobbiton's green hills, and Queenstown's extreme adventures. New Zealand is the world's most dramatic adventure destination.

name: Santorini & Mykonos
tagline: Cycladic icons — whitewashed cliffs, blue domes & Aegean sunsets
description: Santorini's caldera sunsets from Oia are among the most photographed in the world. Mykonos brings glamorous beach clubs and cosmopolitan energy. Together they define the Mediterranean dream.

name: Peru — Machu Picchu & Cusco
tagline: Lost city of the Incas — ancient mystery in the clouds
description: Machu Picchu rising through the morning mist above the Sacred Valley is one of humanity's greatest experiences. Cusco's Inca-Spanish colonial architecture, the Rainbow Mountain, and the Amazon jungle complete the adventure.

name: Morocco — Marrakech & Sahara
tagline: A sensory overload — souks, medinas & sleeping under Saharan stars
description: The labyrinthine medina of Marrakech, the blue city of Chefchaouen, desert camel treks and sleeping in Saharan camps under a blanket of stars. Morocco is the most exotic experience accessible from India.

name: Iceland — Reykjavik & Northern Lights
tagline: Fire & ice — Northern Lights, geysers, glaciers & midnight sun
description: Chase the Northern Lights across Iceland's volcanic landscape, soak in the Blue Lagoon, walk between tectonic plates, and explore waterfalls that seem to pour from another world. The most dramatic landscape on earth.

name: Vietnam — Hanoi, Ha Long Bay & Hoi An
tagline: Limestone karsts, ancient towns & the best street food on earth
description: Cruise through the limestone pillars of Ha Long Bay at sunrise, lose yourself in Hoi An's lantern-lit ancient town, and devour Vietnam's legendary street food in Hanoi's Old Quarter. Budget-friendly brilliance.

name: Sri Lanka — Colombo, Sigiriya & Galle
tagline: The island that has everything — beaches, temples & wildlife safaris
description: Sigiriya's ancient rock fortress, Dambulla's cave temples, Galle's Dutch fort by the sea, whale watching in Mirissa, and Colombo's buzzing food scene. Sri Lanka is the most underrated destination in Asia.

name: Italy — Rome, Florence & Amalfi Coast
tagline: The eternal trinity — ancient Rome, Renaissance art & cliff-side glamour
description: The Colosseum and Vatican in Rome, Michelangelo's David and the Uffizi in Florence, and the jaw-dropping Amalfi Coast clinging to dramatic cliffs above turquoise Mediterranean waters. Italy distilled.

name: Singapore
tagline: The city that has everything — futuristic skyline, hawker food & Gardens by the Bay
description: One of Asia's greatest city-states. Marina Bay Sands, Gardens by the Bay's Supertrees, the world's best hawker food at Maxwell Food Centre, Universal Studios, Sentosa island, and seamless efficiency. Perfect family destination.

name: Kenya — Masai Mara Safari
tagline: The greatest wildlife spectacle on earth — lions, elephants & the Great Migration
description: Witnessing the Great Wildebeest Migration in the Masai Mara is one of the most profound experiences a human can have. Hot air balloon safaris over vast savannah, Big Five game drives at dawn, and authentic Maasai culture.

name: Nepal — Kathmandu & Everest Base Camp Trek
tagline: The roof of the world — trekking to the foot of Everest
description: Kathmandu's ancient UNESCO-listed temples, the thrill of flying into Lukla airport, and the epic 14-day trek to Everest Base Camp through Sherpa villages and rhododendron forests. The ultimate bucket-list adventure.

name: Bhutan
tagline: The last Shangri-La — Gross National Happiness in the Himalayas
description: The world's only carbon-negative country and one of the last pristine Himalayan kingdoms. The Tiger's Nest Monastery clinging to a 3,000m cliff, archery festivals, Buddhist monasteries, and a philosophy of happiness over GDP.

name: Uzbekistan — Samarkand & Bukhara
tagline: The Silk Road — turquoise domes, ancient bazaars & Central Asian splendour
description: Samarkand's Registan Square with its three colossal madrasas is one of the world's great architectural ensembles. Bukhara's ancient trading caravanserais and the Silk Road's legacy make Uzbekistan the world's most underrated destination.

name: Portugal — Lisbon & the Algarve
tagline: Europe's best-value gem — fado, pastéis & golden cliffs
description: Lisbon's hilly streets, vintage trams, soul-stirring fado music, and the world's best custard tarts. Then south to the Algarve's golden sea-stack cliffs and hidden sea caves. Europe's most charming value destination.

name: Patagonia — Argentina & Chile
tagline: The end of the world — glaciers, condors & Tierra del Fuego
description: Torres del Paine's jagged granite towers, Perito Moreno Glacier calving into a turquoise lake, the world's southernmost city of Ushuaia, and hikes through landscapes that look like another planet. For the serious adventurer.

name: Egypt — Cairo & Luxor
tagline: The cradle of civilisation — pyramids, pharaohs & the Nile
description: Standing before the Great Pyramid of Giza is a once-in-a-lifetime experience. Add the Valley of the Kings in Luxor, a felucca sail on the Nile, and the Egyptian Museum's incomparable treasures — and you have history's greatest hit.

name: Amalfi Coast — Weekend
tagline: Cliffside drama — limoncello, cerulean sea & pastel villages
description: A short but intensely beautiful weekend on one of the world's most dramatic coastlines. Positano's coloured houses tumbling to the sea, Ravello's gardens in the clouds, and Amalfi's cathedral. All within a 2-3 day escape.
